description: Fuaran canonical wire-format conformance corpus. node-round-trip / op-round-trip fixtures: decode inputFile, re-encode, assert byte-equal to expectedFile. reject fixtures: decode inputFile, assert DecodeError.Code = expectedErrorCode and DecodeError.Path starts with expectedPath. lenient-accept fixtures (WIRE_FORMAT 16): decode the SHORTHAND inputFile, re-encode, assert byte-equal to expectedFile (the verbose canonical form) — a conformant host MUST accept the shorthand and normalise it; rejecting it, or decoding it to different bytes, is non-conformant. envelope-round-trip / envelope-reject fixtures (WIRE_FORMAT 15): read the $profile/$payload envelope, negotiate the authored profile against the host's own core@1.0, then either re-render byte-equal to expectedFile (Current/Behind — unknown kinds preserved verbatim, must-ignore-but-preserve) or refuse a Foreign profile with expectedErrorCode FOREIGN_PROFILE at expectedPath. elicitation-round-trip / elicitation-reject fixtures (WIRE_FORMAT 18): decode with the decoder-named entry point (elicitation = the envelope codec, elicitation-outcome = the outcome codec), then either re-encode byte-equal to expectedFile or assert the structured refusal (expectedErrorCode at a path starting with expectedPath). elicitation-answer-accept / elicitation-answer-reject fixtures (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4): the inputFile pairs {answer, contract}; run the host's answer-conformance validation and assert acceptance or the expected refusal. See fuaran/docs/WIRE_FORMAT.md.

fixtures.description: a whole-valued number satisfies a floatRange — JSON has one number type (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4)
required fields only — optional fields may be omitted (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4)
string longer than its stringLen bound (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4)
string where the space demands an integer (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4)
undeclared answer key — default-deny by shape (WIRE_FORMAT 18.4)
Answered outcome without an answer object (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
Declined outcome carrying an answer — undeclared key, default-deny (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
outcome outside the closed set — the outcome DU is total (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
unknown elicitation format version — hard-refuse, never mis-decode (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
two answer fields sharing a name (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
contract with no fields — an elicitation must declare its answer (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
undeclared envelope key — default-deny by shape (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
embedded tree fails the standard 3.1 node decode — error re-rooted under $.tree (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
contract field addressing a node absent from the tree (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
full envelope — every value-space kind, optional fields, timeoutMs, conforming default (WIRE_FORMAT 18.2)
minimal envelope — one required enum field, no timeout, no default (WIRE_FORMAT 18.2)
Answered outcome — canonical typed answer object (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
Superseded outcome without a successor id — 'by' is optional (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
TimedOut outcome — dispatched by the HOST's clock; timeoutMs is data (WIRE_FORMAT 18.3)
Foreign (major-ahead core@2.0) — hard-refuse, never silently mis-decode (WIRE_FORMAT 15.2)
enveloped Current (core@1.0) known payload — decode + re-render byte-identical (WIRE_FORMAT 15.1)
Behind (core@1.1) unknown-kind payload — tolerant decode preserves bytes verbatim (WIRE_FORMAT 15.3)
Behind unknown kind with a malformed requiredProfile — no label, bytes still preserved (WIRE_FORMAT 15.3)
Behind unknown kind declaring requiredProfile core@1.4 — preserved + degrade label surfaced (WIRE_FORMAT 15.3)

Legacy `Dashboard` tag decode-upgrades to an Auto/Dashboard Box (Phase 390)

Callout.body (required) + Callout.heading (optional position) as bare strings (§16.1)
Heading.text as a bare JSON string (§16.1)
Markdown.text as a bare JSON string (§16.1) — the highest-frequency saving
Pre-429 boxes-to-null empty options list decodes to the typed empty array (value None stays null)
Pre-429 opaque Map markers decode to the typed empty array
Pre-429 opaque Static options + value decode to the tagged placeholder forms and re-encode typed
Pre-429 opaque Sparkline series decodes to the typed empty array
Pre-429 opaque multi-select values decode to the tagged placeholder list and re-encode typed
Layout/Stack (Phase 428 — Action.Call result targets: closure / into State / into Query)
Layout/Stack (Phase 426 — closure-authored onSelectTag / onToggle / onChangeMulti sentinels)
Layout/Stack (Phase 426 — declarative tabs + modal + disclosure + select, handlers omitted)
Custom (bounded escape, AdvisoryWarning hash + no exposed-ids)
Input/Filters (declarative — omitted onChange + typed range bounds)
Visualisation/Grid (Phase 424 — parameterised Binding.Transform, filter param from a chip)
Mount (§4o — capabilities + TwoWay message shape + value/slot inputs)
Display/Metric (Phase 421 — Binding.Query with a declared dependsOn filter edge)
Switch (view state → details/summary cases + info default)
null Custom prop value (structured JVal position)
null I18n arg value (structured JVal position)
ReorderChildren newOrder is string not array
Plausible-but-invalid kind 'Sparkler' — on the flat wire an unknown primitive is WRONG_NODE_KIND, not a nested DisplayKind miss
Top-level kind 'Widget' is not a recognised node kind
Dashboard children is object not array
Heading level is string not number
Node id is integer not string
Node kind is a bare string not an object
